{{Infobox character
| name = Northstrider
| aliases = Master Northstrider
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Northstrider Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Northstrider, also known as Master Northstrider, is a legendary [[Monarch]] who follows the [[Path of the Hungry Deep]]. A powerful and imposing figure, he is characterized by his massive, muscular build, wild hair, and golden eyes with vertical slits. His hands and arms are covered in pitch-black scales. Known as a [[dragon]]-eating [[Monarch]], he is a wandering figure who lacks a formal clan or sect, instead serving as a leader for unbound [[sacred artists]]. He operates in the territories between the [[dragons]] and [[Akura]] lands, often venturing into the [[Wasteland]] to seek out the [[Beast King]]. As a master of [[hunger madra]], Northstrider possesses the ability to consume [[sacred beasts]] to acquire their power. He is also capable of copying the wills of those he devours into his own techniques. His influence and reach are vast; he is the creator of the pocket world known as [[Ghostwater]], which he built to research ways to enhance his mental processes. He has also been known to support or interact with various powerful entities, including the character [[Lindon]] and the spirit [[Dross]]. Throughout his long history, Northstrider has demonstrated immense authority, once acting as the arbiter for the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament. His ambitions include challenging the [[Abidan]] and utilizing various powerful resources, such as the [[labyrinth]] and [[Dreadgod]] weapons, to further his goals.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Northstrider]] is a man with glowing golden eyes and muscles who consumes [[sacred beasts]] in the deepest places of the world.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Northstrider]] is a [[dragon]]-eater and a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Northstrider]] is a powerful person who reportedly died almost seven years ago.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Monarch]] on the [[Path of the Hungry Deep]], Northstrider created the pocket world known as [[Ghostwater]] to find a method for enhancing his mind. He attempted to manage his thoughts by creating a collective mind, but this endeavor failed due to a lack of creativity and initiative. To compensate, scholars theorized the creation of a super-spirit of [[Dreamseeds]], while Northstrider himself scattered over four thousand memory storage constructs throughout the world. He also left [[soulfire]] at the base of the basin and established a rule where returning the [[Eye of the Deep]] to the tree grants a single question and one drop of ghostwater. Ultimately, Northstrider withdrew his protection from [[Ghostwater]] nearly fifty years before his death, leaving behind personal quarters in the facility and advanced constructs like a smooth black orb.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] is a [[Monarch]] who created [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] abandoned [[Ghostwater]] almost fifty years before his death.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] built a pocket world to find a way to enhance his mind.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Northstrider]] withdrew his presence and protection from [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] is a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] has personal quarters in the facility.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Scholars theorized creating a super-spirit of [[Dreamseeds]] to handle thoughts for [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] built a pocket world.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] scattered over four thousand memory storage constructs across the world.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] instructed that returning the [[Eye of the Deep]] to the tree allows one to ask one question and receive one drop of ghostwater.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] left [[soulfire]] stored at the base of the basin.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] created a collective mind that failed because it lacked initiative and creativity.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] is a [[Monarch]] on the [[Path of the Hungry Deep]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] possesses [[Eyes of the Deep]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] possesses a smooth black orb [[construct]] that acts as an advanced version of the [[Eyes of the Deep]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Northstrider]] attempted to develop transportation gates to [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7">''Underlord'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Northstrider]]'s work helped [[Lindon]] get ahead of schedule.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Northstrider]] is the [[Monarch]] of unbound [[sacred artists]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Northstrider is a wandering [[Monarch]] of the [[Trackless Sea]] associated with [[Ghostwater]] and one of the youngest Archlords ever recorded. A great [[Monarch]] who previously lost his [[life]] in battle against the [[Weeping Dragon]], he emerged from a ragged, blue-edged hole in midair to serve as the patron of the [[Uncrowned]] tournament. Characterized by golden [[dragon]]-like eyes and black scales covering his hands to his elbows, he presided over the competition from a viewing platform atop a ball of dark, floating water. From his position above the maze, he surveyed sixteen young Underlords, decided their matchups, and used his power to carry competitors through the air. After commanding the matches to begin and pitting [[Yerin]] against [[Lindon]], he eventually announced the [[Akura]] team as the victors.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] is associated with [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] is a great [[Monarch]] who lost his [[life]] in battle against the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] stepped out of a ragged, blue-edged hole in midair.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] has golden eyes with vertical slits like gold [[dragons]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] has black scales covering his hands up to his elbows.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] has declared that contestants will fight under his protection and according to his will.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] is smart enough to potentially pull [[Dross]] out of [[Lindon]]'s brain.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] commands the start of the competition.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] is one of the youngest Archlords ever.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]]'s protection is in effect during the tournament rounds.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] announced the [[Akura]] team as the victor.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] appears in the middle of the [[arena]] standing on a high rectangular pillar.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] is located atop a maze.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] commanded the match to begin.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] surveyed sixteen young Underlords.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] is a person deciding matchups in the competition.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] is a [[Monarch]] and the patron of the [[Uncrowned]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] has a [[Monarch viewing platform]] located at a ball of dark, floating water.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] used his power to carry competitors forward through the air.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] resents [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] pitted [[Yerin]] and [[Lindon]] against each other.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] is a wandering [[Monarch]] of the [[Trackless Sea]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] was born with a connection to blood.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]] stands above a dark globe of water.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A muscular [[Monarch]] and [[Sage]] who follows the [[Path of the Hungry Deep]], Northstrider is a master known as the greatest enemy of the [[dragons]]. He utilizes [[hunger madra]], blood [[aura]], and red [[dragon]]-shaped living techniques, often manifesting a blood-based [[Remnant]] with red curling horns and gold [[dragon]] eyes. During various matches, he acts as an arbiter by announcing fights, pitting competitors against one another, and standing between combatants like [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]]. Beyond his role in the [[arena]], he provides protection to [[Eithan]] and possesses the ability to restore both the bodies and minds of others, such as when he healed [[Yerin's spirit]]. He also utilizes his [[hunger madra]] to consume [[essence]] from [[Dreadgods]] to monitor their awakening and has shared his techniques with [[Lindon]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] is a [[Monarch]] with golden eyes and black-scaled hands.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] is the greatest enemy of the [[dragons]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] opened a portal that led onto a steeply sloped roof tiled in rose-tinted crystal.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]]'s eyes gleamed gold.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] is a master.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] follows the [[Path of the Hungry Deep]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] consumed [[sacred beasts]] in the deepest places in the world.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] is a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] has red-scaled fists.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] uses [[Enforced punches]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] fights using blood [[aura]] and living techniques shaped like red dragons.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] manifests a [[Remnant]] made mostly of [[blood madra]] with red curling horns.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider's Remnant]] has the eyes of a gold [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] possesses [[hunger madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] provides protection to [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] announced that [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] were going to fight each other.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ziel]] is a chosen of [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] stands between the competitors during the match.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] pits [[Yan Shoumei]] against [[Blacksword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ziel]] represents [[Northstrider]] in the [[Uncrowned]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] is a huge muscular man with golden eyes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ziel]] is the representative of [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] used a spirit [[Enforcer technique]] while processing cycled powers.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] has borrowed [[Dross]] twice in the last five days.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Herald of the green dragons]] holds a centuries-old grudge against [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] is a [[Monarch]] whom [[Min Shuei]] appealed to.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] has a draconic gaze.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] announced the rematch.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] has the ability to restore people.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] can heal minds as well as bodies.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] asked if [[Yerin]] and [[Calan]] were ready.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] spoke to the group about [[dragon]] strategy.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] provided a ceramic tile with a script on it as a gift.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] resents being summoned.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] is a [[Monarch]] who stands in the center of the [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby]]'s scraps would take weeks to recover without [[Northstrider]]’s restoration.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] restored [[Yerin]]'s body and spirit.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] emphasized discovering common ground between [[Lindon]]'s three [[madra]] types.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] consumes [[madra]] from the [[Dreadgods]] to help determine when they will wake up.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] possesses [[Northstrider]]’s [[hunger madra]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] can restore the [[Moonlight Bridge]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] makes announcements to start fights.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby]] questions if [[Northstrider]] can split her and [[Yerin]] up again.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] uses [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] possesses an oracle codex in his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] has an experimental [[Presence]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] has clashed with [[Reigan Shen]] many times.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] unleashed a shield with a [[binding]] covering a square mile.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] commanded someone to stay.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|After demonstrating the ability to bring back the dead, Northstrider established himself as a champion bearing an emblem of a red [[dragon]] head with golden eyes. He possesses the ability to use both force and blood [[aura]], which allows him to draw streams of blood into vials through mere thought. Utilizing a [[void key]] and an unparalleled understanding of [[hunger madra]], he is capable of traveling by pushing through the [[Way]]. During a confrontation, he summoned a serpentine [[dragon]] of scarlet [[madra]] and slammed his fist into the head of a [[Dreadgod]]. Following a vision in which he moved toward the [[Wandering Titan]], Northstrider worked to recover his spirit midair while assessing the strength lost during his battle with the [[Phoenix]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]] has brought back the dead.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]] is a champion.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]]'s emblem is a red [[dragon]] head with golden eyes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]] can use blood and force aura.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]] can draw streams of blood into vials using [[aura]] and a thought.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]] possesses a [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]] understands the nature of [[hunger madra]] better than anyone else alive.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]] can push through the [[Way]] to travel.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]] slammed his fist into the [[Dreadgod]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]] used a serpentine [[dragon]] of scarlet [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]] moved toward the [[Wandering Titan]] in a vision.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]] is recovering his spirit in midair.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Northstrider]] is categorizing how much strength the battle with the [[Phoenix]] cost him.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|As a [[Tidewalker]] [[Herald]], Northstrider possesses the ability to rouse and direct the [[Dreadgods]]. He maintains a connection with [[Malice]], who is able to call upon him, and his subordinates have conducted studies on [[dreadbeasts]]. Through the act of devouring others, he can incorporate their wills into his own techniques. While observing a [[Dreadgod]] from a distance, he utilized a codex characterized by a reflective black surface and demonstrated familiarity with the functions of the [[labyrinth]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Northstrider]] is a [[Tidewalker]] [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Northstrider]] can rouse and direct the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] hoped [[Northstrider]] would contact him regarding [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] can call upon [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Master [[Northstrider]]'s subordinates studied [[dreadbeasts]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Master [[Northstrider]] can copy the wills of those he devours into his techniques.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Northstrider]] is familiar with the [[labyrinth]]'s functions.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Northstrider]] was watching the [[Dreadgod]] from far away.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Northstrider]] possesses a codex with a reflective black surface.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A powerful [[Monarch]] expected at the meeting with [[Sha Miara]], Northstrider maintains a cloud fortress and possesses an oracle codex for predictions alongside the ability to use spiritual perception. Having left an echo of himself within the [[labyrinth]], he discovered the completed [[Grand Oath Array]] at least two hundred years ago and is noted for refusing to deign to help others. During a battle, an image of him fighting the [[Wandering Titan]] was seen, and he later crashed from high above while trailing a red [[dragon]] of blood and [[hunger madra]]. Utilizing his ability to pull constructs from a personal void space containing high-value projects and resources for reverse-engineering Books, he focused his attention on [[Lindon]]. In combat, Northstrider used an [[Enforcer technique]] layered within a punch delivered by black-scaled hands that shone with blood and hunger, eventually matching a blow from [[Lindon]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] left an echo of himself in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] possesses a cloud fortress.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] uses an oracle codex for information and predictions.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] can use spiritual perception.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] saw an image of [[Northstrider]] in battle with the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] discovered the completed version of the [[Grand Oath Array]] at least two hundred years ago.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] is mentioned as someone who did not deign to help.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] has resources to reverse-engineer Books.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] is trailing a red [[dragon]] of blood and [[hunger madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] crashes from high above during the battle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] can pull constructs from a void space.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] focused on [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider's hands]] were black-scaled and shone with blood and hunger.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]]'s punch was layered with an [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] matched a blow from [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] has high-value projects in his personal void space.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] is a [[Monarch]] who was expected at the meeting with [[Sha Miara]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emerging from the [[Way]], Northstrider wields physical authority through the [[Strength Icon]] and possesses a [[Dreadgod weapon]] along with a limb from the [[Slumbering Wraith]]. During combat, he has utilized explosive air punches, forged serpentine [[dragons]] from his [[madra]], and established barriers around [[Sacred Valley]]. After trading techniques with [[Lindon]] and fighting off an echo of himself alongside three [[Heralds]], he was eventually blasted into the earth by a black [[dragon]]. Northstrider now resides in his fortress, the [[Sunken Tower]], where his authority is absolute and he maintains a simple gray room on the thirtieth floor. Though he possesses [[Monarch]]-level willpower and intends to gather power to force the [[Abidan]] to remove the [[Dreadgods]], he remains afraid to ascend and was eventually forced to advance by [[Lindon]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]]'s authority is physical.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]]'s halls are larger than the current pocket world.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] does not seem to need a weapon.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] emerged from the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] held out a palm during the attack.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] punched with an explosion of air.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] forged a defensive layer of bloody [[madra]] around himself.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] possesses the authority of the [[Strength Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] set up barriers around [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A serpentine [[dragon]] was forged from [[Northstrider]]'s [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] is trading techniques with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] is content to lock [[Lindon]] in place.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] fought off an echo of himself and three other [[Heralds]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] possesses a [[Dreadgod weapon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] possesses a limb from the [[Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] sent [[Striker techniques]] after [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] was blasted into the earth by a black [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]]'s [[Consume]] was used to help create [[Yerin]]'s hunger technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]]'s power was thrashing inside [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can push [[Northstrider]]’s power through a bond to [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] delivered a blow worthy of [[Northstrider]] onto the [[Weeping Dragon]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]]'s current headquarters is the [[Sunken Tower]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] has a fortress that serves as the current seat of his power.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]]'s authority cannot be surpassed within his fortress.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] has a simple gray room on the thirtieth floor of his fortress.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] was tutored by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] used spiritual perception to envelop the world for hundreds of miles.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] locked the entrance to Emriss's prison.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]]'s eyes are not golden.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] intended to gather power to force the [[Abidan]] to remove the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]]'s willpower is that of a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] asks [[Lindon]] for a word that he won't attack while his guard is down.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] attempted to destroy an echo of his past self.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] possesses a [[Consume]] technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] is afraid to ascend.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]]'s [[Consume]] technique causes a rush of white and gray to flood into him.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] does not have an established sect or clan.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] intends to make a clean break.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] sends instructions to [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] has experience manipulating the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] forced [[Northstrider]] to advance.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Possessing a perfect and unassailable body, Northstrider utilizes wind [[aura]] alongside blood and [[hunger madra]], the latter of which resonates with his innate curiosity. He wields an oracle codex and maintains connections to multiple [[Icons]], having even sensed the echo of the [[Strength Icon]]. Since his ascension, he has evolved his spiritual perception beyond that of a [[Monarch]] and developed a gift for working with time. While he has made many [[dragons]] part of himself, his techniques were notably reduced in collateral damage by the stability of [[Sanctum]]. Despite his black-scaled hand and a period where his body was broken and twisted, his authority remains capable of healing [[Lindon]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]] has a black-scaled hand.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]] possesses an oracle codex.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]] uses blood and [[hunger madra]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]]'s techniques were reduced in collateral damage by the stability of [[Sanctum]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]] has an oracle codex and a connection to multiple [[Icons]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]] has sensed the echo of the [[Strength Icon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]] has evolved his perception from that of a [[Monarch]] since ascending.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]] has a gift for working with time.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]] has made many [[dragons]] part of himself.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]]'s body is perfect and unassailable.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]]'s curiosity resonates with [[hunger madra]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]] uses wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]] possesses spiritual perception.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]]'s body was broken and twisted.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]]'s authority can heal [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Return the Eye of the Deep to the tree,” Northstrider instructed, golden eyes turning to the massive scripted device. “You may ask one question and receive one drop of ghostwater.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Northstrider,” Suriel said. “Path of the Hungry Deep.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|"You thinking Northstrider can split us up again after?"<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|"Stay," Northstrider commanded, own will opposed the opening of the portal.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Has the time come for the champion to name her wish?” Northstrider asked.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
